code.description: The error code that identifies the error.
code.title: CodeSchema

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.

timestamp.description: The timestamp (in UTC) when the error occurred.

deviceEndpointRuntimeHealthEvent.description: Telemetry event emitted for reporting the runtime health of the specific inbound endpoint as specified in the topic.

runtimeHealth.description: The runtime health of the specific inbound endpoint details as specified in the topic.
runtimeHealth.title: RuntimeHealth

version.description: The version of the resource for which the runtime health is being reported.

status.description: The current health status of the resource.
status.title: StatusSchema

lastUpdateTime.description: The timestamp (RFC3339) when the health status was last updated, even if the status did not change.

message.description: A human-readable message describing the last transition.

reasonCode.description: Unique, CamelCase reason code describing the cause of the last health state transition.

datasetRuntimeHealthEvent.description: Telemetry event emitted for reporting the runtime health of datasets.

assetName.description: The name of the asset containing the datasets for which the runtime health is being reported.

datasets.description: Array of dataset runtime health information.

datasetName.description: The name of the dataset for which the runtime health is being reported.

runtimeHealth.description: The runtime health of the specific dataset.
runtimeHealth.title: RuntimeHealth

eventRuntimeHealthEvent.description: Telemetry event emitted for reporting the runtime health of events.

assetName.description: The name of the asset containing the events for which the runtime health is being reported.

events.description: Array of event runtime health information.

eventGroupName.description: The name of the event group containing the event for which the runtime health is being reported.

eventName.description: The name of the event for which the runtime health is being reported.

runtimeHealth.description: The runtime health of the specific event.
runtimeHealth.title: RuntimeHealth

managementActions.description: Array of management action runtime health information.

managementGroupName.description: The name of the management group for which the runtime health is being reported.

managementActionName.description: The name of the management action for which the runtime health is being reported.
